3029580.name: Boop a Cat Soundtrack
3029580.description: Just an ever-growing collection of short loop tracks for my game.  The style changes and the instruments change, as each track is for a different part of the main game.  Some I made retro, while others are more techno.  I plan to add many more with each new game update I do.  So, this will just continue to grow and evolve over time.  As I plan to upgrade older songs when I improve my music-making skills.
